title: localization — retention windows
description: PlatformLanguage + WorkspaceLocale retained while workspace active. Translation retention driven by source: file-imported = permanent, human-verified = permanent, ai-translated = TTL per plan. TranslationJob = 1 year hot, then hard purge.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation — AI translations don't carry personal data as such but source strings may)

hot.days: while any workspace has it enabled

purge.trigger: manual archive by platform admin + zero WorkspaceLocale references
purge.notes: Deleting a PlatformLanguage row NEVER cascades to the referenced geography::Language / geography::Country rows — those are owned by the geography module (vendor seed via nnjeim/world) and outlive individual platform enablement decisions. Onward FK integrity is enforced with onDelete=restrict on both geography FKs.

purge.trigger: translated_at + TTL past + no recent access
> 1 year old + state IN (completed / failed / cancelled)
